channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Global funds flee Indian stocks at record pace on growth fears
item.description: Global funds are exiting Indian equities at a record pace, driven by an energy shock from the US-Iran war and a lack of compelling AI-linked investment narratives. This sustained selling has pressured local shares, with over $600 billion wiped off their value…

item.title: OpenAI paused Stargate UK project why? #tech
item.description: OpenAI’s Stargate UK is on ice OpenAI has put its “Stargate UK” data center initiative on hold. The company’s stated reasons were twofold: high energy costs and an unfavorable regulatory environment . What’s known from the coverage The reporting ties the paus… [OpenAI]
